title: 导出单个检查点定义
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vsss=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService

# 1) 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_snapshot_export'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 2) CreateSnapshot (SnapshotType 2 = Full)。OUT 参数 ResultingSnapshot 为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 路径
$rs=$vsss.CreateSnapshot($vm.__PATH,$null,2)
if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rs.Job | Out-Null }
$snapPath=$rs.ResultingSnapshot

# 3) 构造 Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData: 仅导出该检查点
$esd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData").CreateInstance()
$esd.CopySnapshotConfiguration=[uint16]2     # 2 = ExportOneSnapshot
$esd.SnapshotVirtualSystem=$snapPath         # 检查点 VSSD 的路径
$esd.CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true

# 4) ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem, ExportDirectory, ExportSettingData GetText(1))
$re=$vsms.ExportSystemDefinition($vm.__PATH, $exportDir, $esd.GetText(1))
if($re.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $re.Job | Out-Null }   # 作业成功终态 JobState=7
# 产物: <exportDir>/<VMName>/Virtual Machines/<snapshotGUID>.vmcx (+.vmgs/.VMRS)

# 清理
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vsss=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService

# 1) Create a generation 2 virtual machine
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_snapshot_export'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 2) CreateSnapshot (SnapshotType 2 = Full). The OUT parameter ResultingSnapshot is a Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData path
$rs=$vsss.CreateSnapshot($vm.__PATH,$null,2)
if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rs.Job | Out-Null }
$snapPath=$rs.ResultingSnapshot

# 3) Build a Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData: export only this checkpoint
$esd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData").CreateInstance()
$esd.CopySnapshotConfiguration=[uint16]2     # 2 = ExportOneSnapshot
$esd.SnapshotVirtualSystem=$snapPath         # Path of the checkpoint VSSD
$esd.CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true

# 4) ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem, ExportDirectory, ExportSettingData GetText(1))
$re=$vsms.ExportSystemDefinition($vm.__PATH, $exportDir, $esd.GetText(1))
if($re.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $re.Job | Out-Null }   # Successful terminal job state JobState=7
# Artifacts: <exportDir>/<VMName>/Virtual Machines/<snapshotGUID>.vmcx (+.vmgs/.VMRS)

# Cleanup
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null
output:
VM created: WMITEST_snapshot_export Name=A5B81A3D-511B-4F25-9832-792D2DBF28D5
Snapshot created: ElementName=WMITEST_snapshot_export - (2026/7/1 - 2:08:01) VSSDType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized
Snapshot path: ...Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData.InstanceID="Microsoft:0A43B27E-6728-449E-9AF8-584F60345AD4"
ExportSettingData built (CopySnapshotConfiguration=2, SnapshotVirtualSystem set)
ExportSystemDefinition rv=4096
Export job final state=7 (completed)
Exported artifact count: 6
  ART: \WMITEST_snapshot_export
  ART: \WMITEST_snapshot_export\Virtual Hard Disks
  ART: \WMITEST_snapshot_export\Virtual Machines
  ART: \WMITEST_snapshot_export\Virtual Machines\0A43B27E-...-...vmcx
  ART: ...vmgs
  ART: ...VMRS
ASSERT vmcx present
RESULT: PASS
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
RESIDUAL: NONE
notes: 导出单个检查点没有独立的 ExportSnapshotDefinition 方法，应使用 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ExportSystemDefinition，并配合 Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData(CopySnapshotConfiguration=2 ExportOneSnapshot，SnapshotVirtualSystem 指向检查点 VSSD 路径)。
ExportSystemDefinition 参数顺序：ComputerSystem(虚拟机的 Msvm_ComputerSystem 路径，非检查点)、ExportDirectory(目录字符串)、ExportSettingData(内嵌实例，GetText(1))。导出哪个检查点由 ExportSettingData.SnapshotVirtualSystem 指定。
CopySnapshotConfiguration 的 ValueMap：0=ExportAllSnapshots，1=ExportNoSnapshots，2=ExportOneSnapshot，3=ExportOneSnapshotForBackup。取 2 或 3 时 CopyVmStorage/CopyVmRuntimeInformation 被忽略，存储与运行时信息一并导出。
CreateSnapshot 的 OUT 参数名为 ResultingSnapshot，返回一个 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 路径；SnapshotType 2=Full，3=Disk。返回 4096 时需轮询作业。
ExportSystemDefinition 返回 4096(异步作业)，作业成功终态 JobState=7。产物位于 <exportDir>/<VMName>/Virtual Machines/ 下，配置文件 .vmcx 以检查点 InstanceID 的 GUID 命名，并伴随 .vmgs 与 .VMRS。
CreateVmExportSubdirectory=true 会在导出目录下创建以虚拟机 ElementName 命名的子目录。
notes_en: There is no dedicated ExportSnapshotDefinition method for exporting a single checkpoint; use Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ExportSystemDefinition together with a Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData (CopySnapshotConfiguration=2 ExportOneSnapshot, with SnapshotVirtualSystem pointing to the checkpoint VSSD path).

ExportSystemDefinition parameter order: ComputerSystem (the Msvm_ComputerSystem path of the virtual machine, not the checkpoint), ExportDirectory (a directory string), ExportSettingData (an embedded instance, GetText(1)). Which checkpoint is exported is determined by ExportSettingData.SnapshotVirtualSystem.

ValueMap for CopySnapshotConfiguration: 0=ExportAllSnapshots, 1=ExportNoSnapshots, 2=ExportOneSnapshot, 3=ExportOneSnapshotForBackup. When 2 or 3 is used, CopyVmStorage/CopyVmRuntimeInformation are ignored and the storage and runtime information are exported together.
The OUT parameter of CreateSnapshot is named ResultingSnapshot and returns a Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData path; SnapshotType 2=Full, 3=Disk. When 4096 is returned, the job must be polled.

ExportSystemDefinition returns 4096 (an asynchronous job), with a successful terminal JobState=7. The artifacts are located under <exportDir>/<VMName>/Virtual Machines/; the .vmcx configuration file is named after the GUID of the checkpoint InstanceID and is accompanied by .vmgs and .VMRS files.
CreateVmExportSubdirectory=true creates a subdirectory named after the virtual machine's ElementName within the export directory.
